narrative:
Bern Township (precinct in Athens County) has 313 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 20.4 percentage points.
